title: փախիլ
definition: ['to flee, to escape, to get away, to run away, to fly, to take flight, to desert, to fly off.']

title: փաշայ
definition: ['pasha, the title of a Turkish officer of high rank.']

title: փշրիլ
definition: ['փշրուիլ, փշրիլ (to break, to be broken to pieces, to dash, to split.']

title: փրթիլ
definition: ['to be broken off, to break off, to be detached, to snap, to come off.']
